subcodes.first_line: O Lord, my God, my Best-Beloved, my Aim, my heart’s Desire! This, verily, is the first of the days of Ridvan… In the realm of worship, fasting and obligatory prayer constitute the two mightiest pillars of God’s holy Law
subcodes.first_line_orig: اللهم یا الهی و محبوبی و مطلوبی و مقصودی ان هذا یوم الاول من الرضوان قد اتی
subcodes.subjects: @Holy Days and the Baha'i calendar, @suffering and imprisonment, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @House of Worship [Mashriqu'l-Adhkar], @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @avoidance of Covenant-Breakers, @unity; oneness of humanity, @law of obligatory prayer
